text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It is finally my turn to race. Are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I'd expect nothing less of my—I mean... of
the trainer to an Umamusume from the esteemed
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm getting all fired up! This is just the
amount of tension I need.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: For the dream I must fulfill... Here I go!
